title: Dungeon Difficulty x Jade
description: Addon for Jade that shows information about Dungeon Difficulty's Power Level
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_30d0efba-01ca-4406-824f-1cf611f0de63.png)

This addon allows the player to see the Power Level of the mob after they have been scaled with the option to also show the attributes that has been given to them (Can be enabled inside the Jade Entities config)

## Requires:
- Dungeon Difficulty
- Jade
- Architecturary
